title: pvp+ 1.20.1
description: this modpack is directed at improving pvp and visuals,
body: # ⚔️ PvP+ 1.20.1 > The high-performance 1.20.1 prototype of the main PvP+ modpack. Built for strictly superior PvP mechanics, visual upgrades, and maximum frame rates. --- ### 🚀 Extreme Optimization This version delivers significantly better performance than vanilla Minecraft. All benchmark images below were captured at a **32-chunk render distance**. **Vanilla 1.20.1 [115 FPS]** ![Vanilla 1.20.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e5496a27ba388e9ff84df82781dbf8d89c145aa.png) **Main PvP+ 1.21.4 [363 FPS]** ![PvP+ 1.21.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06fb7707adfbe8bfa71d3725913ee551093a6c30.png) **This Pack: PvP+ 1.20.1 [1045 FPS]** ![PvP+ 1.20.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/964bc6d800fec2f5394649ab42d5990dff7e8f27.png) --- ### ⚖️ 1.20.1 vs Main PvP+ (1.21.4) Why choose this prototype over the main branch? **Advantages (+):** * **Massive FPS Boost:** Drastically better optimization compared to PvP+ 1.21.4. * **Mod Compatibility:** A more stable environment if you want to add your own mods on top. * **Exclusive Mods:** Contains several useful PvP mods that simply haven't been ported to 1.21.4 yet. **Disadvantages (-):** * **Less Functionality:** Lacks some of the newer features present in the main PvP+ pack. * **No Future Updates:** I consider this modpack feature-complete. It will likely not receive further updates. --- ### ⚠️ Important Warnings & Setup **Key Bindings & Settings:** Unlike the main version, this modpack includes pre-configured settings and keybinds out of the box. However, it is highly recommended that you check the Mod Menu and rebind them to fit your personal playstyle before starting a fight.
